ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the football team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the current team manager */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the football league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league operates */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the league's logo */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Current number of teams in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "team_home_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "team_away_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the match belongs to */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referee for the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the stadium */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., league, cup, friendly) */,
  "match_time" TEXT /* Time of the match (e.g., 15:00) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_home_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_home_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_team_away_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_away_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player in the team */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot (left or right) */,
  "injured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the player is currently injured */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won */,
  "tackles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of tackles lost */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of experience the coach has */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the coach's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the coach's contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Goals conceded by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  "goals_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference (goals for minus goals against) */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (matches without conceding a goal) */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Current position in the league table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being transferred */,
  "from_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is leaving */,
  "to_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is joining */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee for the player */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "transfer_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., permanent, loan) */,
  "loan_fee" REAL /* Loan fee (if applicable) */,
  "loan_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the loan (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_to_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_from_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player with the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., Hamstring, Ankle) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the injury started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the injury ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., recovering, fit) */,
  "rehabilitation_start" TEXT /* Start date of rehabilitation */,
  "rehabilitation_end" TEXT /* End date of rehabilitation */,
  "estimated_return_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of return to play */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player under contract */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is contracted to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the contract */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the contract */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., full-time, part-time) */,
  "bonus_terms" TEXT /* Bonus terms and conditions */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Status of the contract (e.g., active, expired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user accessed the system */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser/device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
